title: desmanthus virgatus var. depressus
intro: Desmanthus virgatus var. depressus, also known as Japanese fleabane or creeping fleabane, is a perennial herb native to East Asia, characterized by its small white flowers and hairy stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Desmanthus virgatus var. depressus include reducing inflammation and fever, as well as treating respiratory and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
